Event photo
Featured
September 20, 2025

The Great Awakening Worship Experience

A global worship convergence organised by Hayah Ministries International, Ottawa. Expect God's mighty power through healing, deliverance, and extraordinary breakthrough.

Tony Graham Recreation Complex, 100 Charlie Rogers, Kanata, ON

Canada & Botswana Worship Experience

Event photo
Recurring
Monthly · Ottawa & Online

Knee-Force Prayer Gathering

Monthly intercessory prayer meetings for the body of Christ — in person and online. All are welcome.
